creator: me@enriquefynn.com
text:
Created attachment 192612
go-ethereum-1.8.4.diff

Updates to go-ethereum 1.8.4
  Major updates include:
  
  Optimizes dirty object handling during block processing, leading to 40% faster blocks
  Stabilizes transaction spam eviction from the transaction pool
  Speeds up external API calls operating on the pending state
  Fixes a rare light client deadlock
